caption: Two men sit in front of a television screen in a room with a shelf of media cases behind them. On the wall above, a neon sign reads "OUR STUPID REACTIONS". Both men wear grey t-shirts and necklaces; the man on the left has grey hair and a neutral expression, while the man on the right has reddish-brown hair and holds his hand to his chin. A small inset video window displays a scene from a different setting featuring a man in ornate gold and dark clothing. As the sequence progresses, the man on the left slightly shifts his head and brings his hand up toward his face. The inset video shows different moments of the ornate character in a room with golden architectural details, and the text "Shailbani Khan" appears briefly at the bottom of the inset in the first frame.
